home.meta_title: Áras Living — Fitted Cabinetry for Irish Homes and Commercial Spaces
home.meta_description: Fitted cabinetry, kitchens, wardrobes and furniture packages for private homes, trade professionals and residential developments across Ireland.
home.hero_headline: Fitted cabinetry for Irish homes and commercial spaces.
home.hero_subheadline: Designed with precision and managed from brief to installation.
home.intro_headline: Fitted cabinetry, shaped around the room
home.intro_body: Áras Living creates fitted cabinetry for homes and commercial spaces across Ireland, shaped around the room, the brief and the way the space should feel.
home.intro_quote: The room first. The finish second. The specification only when the feeling is right.
home.process_headline: From first idea to installed cabinetry.
home.cta_headline: Start with the room. We will help shape the specification.
home.cta_subheadline: Tell us what you are planning. We will help shape the cabinetry around the space, budget and finish you want.
home.material_world_statement: Painted fronts, warm wood finishes, worktops and details — chosen for how they age, feel, and fit.
home.trust_headline: Measured in millimetres, built on trust
